steps.title: Match theory and audience
steps.content: The student needs to present the influence theory to readers unfamiliar with the Haudenosaunee Confederacy. The best choice should both state what the theory claims and briefly explain the Great Law of Peace and the six Native nations.

steps.title: Reject incomplete options
steps.content: A is too vague because it says only that the Great Law was influential. B gives support for the theory without explaining the theory. D broadens the point to Native influence in general, not this specific theory. The answer is C.
